subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice for Thy love! Thy noble missive, which was a repository of the musk of inner meanings and the dawning-place of sufficient, healing utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحبک الفداء رقیمه کریمه عالی که مخزن مسک معانی و مطلع بیان کافی شافی بود
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
